name: sonic
description: Local media intake and music metadata companion for beat producers
author: Eternia Studios

scripts.notices:rust: cargo fetch --locked --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && cargo about generate --frozen --fail --all-features --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --config about.toml --output-file artifacts/licenses/SONIC-RUST-THIRD-PARTY-LICENSES.html scripts/cargo-about.hbs
scripts.notices:generate: npm run notices:npm && npm run notices:rust
scripts.release:prepare: npm run build && npm run notices:generate
